NVIDIA Llama Nemotron Ultra Open Model Delivers Groundbreaking Reasoning Accuracy

April 7, 2025

NVIDIA is releasing NVIDIA Llama Nemotron Ultra, a 253B parameter open reasoning model available as nemotron-ultra-253b. This model delivers strong performance on complex reasoning tasks.

Model Overview

Nemotron Ultra 253B is a post-trained version of Llama 3.1 405B with extended reasoning capability through RLVR training. It achieves top-tier performance on GPQA and AIME benchmarks among open models.

Benchmarks

On GPQA Diamond, Nemotron Ultra achieves 84.0%. On AIME 2024, it achieves 73.3%. These are NVIDIA-reported results. Independent verification is ongoing.

Open Weights

Model weights are available at Nemotron on HuggingFace under an open license.

Technical Report

See the Nemotron Ultra Technical Report for architecture and training details.

Safety

NVIDIA follows standard safety evaluation practices. A dedicated safety card for Nemotron Ultra is not available; safety status is reported as unknown.
